title: Pellicle for extreme ultraviolet lithography
abstract: This application relates to a pellicle for extreme ultraviolet lithography used in a lithography process using extreme ultraviolet rays. In one aspect, the pellicle includes a pellicle layer formed of an M-Î± material in which M is combined with Î±. Here, M is one of Si, Zr, Mo, Ru, Y, W, Ti, Ir, or Nb, and Î± is at least two of B, N, C, O, or F.
claims: 1. A pellicle for extreme ultraviolet lithography, the pellicle comprising: a pellicle layer comprising an M-α compound in which Mis combined with α, wherein: M comprises Si or Y, and α comprises B and N.
